description: Energy Blueprint 9 Centers with their associated gate numbers

Head.function: Pressure to think, to be inspired, to answer questions

Ajna.function: Processing, conceptualizing, forming opinions and theories

Throat.function: Communication, expression, manifestation into form, action

G.function: Identity, direction in life, love, self-expression

Heart.function: Willpower, ego, material world, self-worth, courage

SolarPlexus.biologicalCorrelate: Kidneys, prostate, pancreas, nervous system — emotions
SolarPlexus.function: Emotions, feelings, desire, sensitivity, emotional wave

Sacral.biologicalCorrelate: Ovaries, testes — life force, fertility, sexuality
Sacral.function: Life force energy, work capacity, fertility, response, availability

Spleen.biologicalCorrelate: Lymphatic system, spleen, T-cells — immune system, intuition
Spleen.function: Survival, health, intuition, time, fear, instinct, taste and values

Root.function: Pressure to evolve, stress management, drive, fuel for ambition
